title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions in Vadodara is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions:
Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindalco Industries Ventures Solutions!
